name: Ternopil Oblast (Ukraine)

colors.symbolism: the azure of the historic Galician arms and the Carpathian sky

description: A blue field charged in the centre with the coat of arms of Ternopil Oblast — recalling the heraldry of Galicia and Podolia.
history: Adopted as the regional flag of Ternopil Oblast, a region of western Ukraine bordering Galicia, Volhynia, and Podolia.
